case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JUAN MANUEL GARCIA RODRIQUEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 SERVED MAY-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ, JUAN MANUEL GARCIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JUAN MANUEL GARCIA RODRIQUEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D514).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,617.90 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ, JUAN MANUEL GARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
